ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., Toddler 2T) */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement (e.g., 14 in) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement (e.g., 11 in) */,
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age range */,
  "height_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the height range */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the clothing (e.g., Toddler, Baby) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the size chart (e.g., Boys, Girls, Unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the size chart (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the size chart (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_height_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("height_range_id") REFERENCES height_ranges ("height_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_age_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_range_id") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Toddler, Baby) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Length, Chest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., in, cm) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement for the size chart (e.g., 14 in) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the measurement */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the measurement */,
  "is_range" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement value is a range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the age range (e.g., 1-2 Years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in months */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in months */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default age range for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "height_ranges" (
  "height_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height range */,
  "height_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the height range (e.g., 33-35 in) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the height range */,
  "min_height" INTEGER /* Minimum height in inches */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* Maximum height in inches */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default height range for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, product manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was from a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
